description: Realistic isometric tactics/sim character, base movement/action set: idle-se, walk-se, walk-ne, walk-sw, walk-nw.

states.name: idle-se
states.action: Isometric idle loop facing south-east (diagonally toward the viewer and to the right): subtle breathing and a tiny sway between nearly identical poses. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces south-east (diagonally toward the viewer, foreground-facing) in every frame.
Keep the pose, silhouette, and palette essentially identical between frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: walk-se
states.action: South-east walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed on the isometric diagonal toward the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces and moves south-east (diagonally toward the viewer and to the right) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: walk-ne
states.action: North-east walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed on the isometric diagonal away from the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces and moves north-east (diagonally away from the viewer and to the right, back mostly visible) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: walk-sw
states.action: South-west walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed on the isometric diagonal toward the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces and moves south-west (diagonally toward the viewer and to the left) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: walk-nw
states.action: North-west walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed on the isometric diagonal away from the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces and moves north-west (diagonally away from the viewer and to the left, back mostly visible) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
